title: 'azan #0238
definition:
1) to hear, listen
    1a) (Hiphil)
        1a1) to hear, listen, give ear
        1a2) to be obedient, harken
        1a3) to hear or listen to prayers (of God)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to hear, listen
    1a) (Hiphil)
        1a1) to hear, listen, give ear
        1a2) to be obedient, harken
        1a3) to hear or listen to prayers (of God)

    NASB:  to give ear, listen
